https://openminds.om-i.org/props/alterna._instruction: Enter any other known full name of this person.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/alterna.label: Alternate name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/alterna.name: alternateName

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/associa._instruction: Add the information about web service accounts held by this person.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/associa.label: Associated account
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/associa.name: associatedAccount

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contact._instruction: Add the contact information of this person.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contact.description: Any available way used to contact a person or business (e.g., address, phone number, email address, etc.).
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contact.label: Contact information
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/contact.name: contactInformation

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/digital._instruction: Add all globally unique and persistent digital identifier of this person.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/digital.description: Digital handle to identify objects or legal persons.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/digital.label: Digital identifier
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/digital.name: digitalIdentifier

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/familyN._instruction: Enter the family name, surname, or equivalent of this person.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/familyN.description: Name borne in common by members of a family.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/familyN.label: Family name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/familyN.name: familyName

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/givenNa._instruction: Enter the given name(s) of this person, or a name chosen in place of the given name. At least one of the names should be spelled out in full; initials may be used for the others.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/givenNa.description: Name given to a person, including all potential middle names, but excluding the family name.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/givenNa.label: Given name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/givenNa.name: givenName

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/preferr._instruction: Enter the person’s preferred way to write their name in a professional context. It is recommended to place given before family name separated by space.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/preferr.label: Preferred name
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/preferr.name: preferredName
